name: cortex
description: Local-first repo context engine for Codex. Provides graph-aware MCP tools, repository overview, impact analysis, symbol search, and refresh.

interface.shortDescription: Graph-aware local repo context for Codex
interface.longDescription: Cortex indexes a git repository into a local SQLite graph and exposes MCP tools for task-focused retrieval, overview reports, impact analysis, symbol search, and refresh.
defaultPrompt: Use Cortex to inspect this repository before broad file search.
Ask Cortex which files and symbols are relevant to this change.
